case_title: ANTONIO QUINOZ VS. ANTONIO JUAREZ YADER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00- SERVED MAR-31-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YADER, ANTONIO JUAREZ DBA. MIKES GARAGE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-03-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO ADD PARTIES AND SERVICE THE DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT TO PLTFF'S CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUINOZ, ANTONIO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,395.00 FILED BY QUINOZ, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT YADER, ANTONIO JUAREZ DBA. MIKES GARAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,395.00 FILED BY QUINOZ, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT YADER, ANTONIO JUAREZ DBA. MIKES GARAGE SUAREZ, YADER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGARITA PEREZ. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINOZ, ANTONIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YADER, ANTONIO JUAREZ DBA. MIKES GARAGE SUAREZ, YADER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
